note: Current and upcoming events from the White Plains / WPCNA community calendar. Dates follow each event's recurring schedule; confirm details on the linked city or library page.

events.title: English Conversation Group
events.location: White Plains Public Library, Community Room
events.summary: A free drop-in group for adults who want to practice everyday English. Meets weekly.

events.title: White Plains Farmers Market
events.summary: Local produce, baked goods, and vendors downtown — held weekly through the summer and fall season.

events.title: Common Council Meeting
events.summary: A public Common Council meeting at City Hall.

events.title: STEAM Saturday
events.location: White Plains Public Library, Galaxy Hall
events.summary: Hands-on STEAM time for kids in grades 4 through 8 at the White Plains Public Library.

events.title: White Plains Soccer Fest 2026
events.summary: A free citywide celebration inspired by the FIFA World Cup 2026™, turning downtown into a fan-filled destination with music, food, and activities.

events.title: Downtown White Plains Rock the Block 2026
events.summary: A free downtown street series with live music, food, games, and room to hang out.

events.title: Common Council Meeting
events.summary: A public Common Council meeting at City Hall.

events.title: Free Document Shredding Day
events.summary: Bring confidential personal documents to the Gedney Yard for free on-site shredding. Junk mail, newspapers, and cardboard are not accepted.

events.title: "Energize U" Energy Efficiency Workshop
events.summary: A workshop on lowering energy bills, with dinner and a free conservation kit.

events.title: Block-toberfest
events.summary: A free fall block party with music, games, vendors, and family activities downtown.

events.title: Downtown White Plains Holiday Market
events.location: White Plains City Center, former Barnes & Noble space
events.summary: An indoor holiday market with local vendors in the former Barnes & Noble space at City Center.
